interpretation: The frozen three-voice screen and its automatic integrity result remain unchanged. Both pm_alex and pf_dora were perceived as Brazilian Portuguese voices with different accent and delivery impressions. Creator comparative listening selects pm_alex as the expressive default because its delivery sounded more dramatic and soulful; pf_dora remains a fully acceptable, more formal-sounding alternate. This does not rank Brazilian authenticity and is not Brazilian-population validation or renderer/rule promotion.
